name: agent-freeboard
title: agent-freeboard
description: AI-enabled dashboard builder and free open-source alternative to Geckoboard for JSON, MQTT, and plugin-backed real-time data.

scripts.verify:cli: node scripts/agent-freeboard.mjs validate examples/freeboard-demo.json && node scripts/agent-freeboard.mjs create examples/agent-dashboard-spec.json --out .artifacts/agent-dashboard.json && node scripts/agent-freeboard.mjs deploy .artifacts/agent-dashboard.json --out .artifacts/agent-dashboard-site
scripts.verify: npm audit --audit-level=moderate && npm run build && npm run verify:assets && npm run verify:examples && npm run verify:cli
